usageNotes.note: Validated as drop-in inductor replacement in 216W GaN sync buck (48V→13.5V/16A @ 750kHz). DCR=2.4mΩ gives 154mW improvement over 3mΩ original. Isat=37A provides 1.97× margin at worst case (Vin=60V, L-20tol, T=125°C, IL_pk=16.90A). SRF=13MHz is 17× above Fsw. Ray review: rejected 74436411000 (same family, lower DCR=1.33mΩ) because Isat@125°C=19.4A gives only 1.15× margin — below 1.2× minimum. Nicola review: core loss at 750kHz not characterized; estimate 0.2-0.5W total. Net efficiency gain: +0.07% analytical / +0.10% simulation. APPROVED for EPC9195-style GaN bucks at this operating point.
